note: I0 contract-inventory ground truth for Morpho on Ethereum (1) + Base (8453). User pre-sign surface = Morpho Blue singleton (cover; supply/borrow/repay/withdraw/collateral/setAuthorization + off-chain Authorization). MetaMorpho VAULTS are the other user surface but are factory CHILDREN (not in a static deployment list) — the factories are exclude here; the covered vault batch + full universe live in metamorpho-*.coverage.json + _address_universe.json. Bundler3 + adapters are user-facing routers but DEFERRED this round (nested multicall-adapter decode is a large separate effort) — marked exclude with a DEFERRED reason, tracked as a known coverage gap (evidence.md). Everything else = governance / keeper / oracle / IRM / V2 factory / registry infra. Honest floor: as complete as docs.morpho.org/addresses + blue-sdk; MORPHO token disposition flagged (two contracts) and verified on Etherscan (0x58d9..=ERC1967Proxy wrapper, 0x9994..=MorphoToken original).

contracts.name: Morpho Blue (singleton)
contracts.reason: core lending singleton — supply/withdraw/borrow/repay/supplyCollateral/withdrawCollateral/setAuthorization + off-chain Authorization (morpho-blue.coverage.json)

contracts.name: Morpho Blue (singleton)
contracts.reason: same singleton on Base (morpho-blue-base.coverage.json)

contracts.name: MetaMorpho Factory V1.1
contracts.reason: vault-deployment factory (createMetaMorpho) — only vault creators call it; the vault INSTANCES are the user surface (metamorpho-mainnet.coverage.json + _address_universe.json)

contracts.name: MetaMorpho Factory V1.1
contracts.reason: vault-deployment factory; instances are the user surface (metamorpho-base.coverage.json)

contracts.name: MetaMorpho Factory V1.0 [OLD]
contracts.reason: superseded vault factory; instances are the user surface

contracts.name: Bundler3
contracts.reason: DEFERRED (not infra): user-facing multicall router the Morpho app routes most actions through. Decoding it = nested multicall(Call[]) -> GeneralAdapter1 adapter-ABI recursion, a large separate effort. Tracked as a known coverage gap (evidence.md); follow-up bundler-decode batch.

contracts.name: Bundler3
contracts.reason: DEFERRED (not infra): Base multicall router; same as mainnet Bundler3.

contracts.name: GeneralAdapter1
contracts.reason: DEFERRED (not infra): the adapter Bundler3 re-enters; encodes the actual supply/borrow/erc4626 legs inside a bundle. (Note: this is the operator address users grant via Morpho Blue setAuthorization — that grant IS covered.) Follow-up with Bundler3.

contracts.name: GeneralAdapter1
contracts.reason: DEFERRED (not infra): Base bundler adapter; follow-up with Bundler3.

contracts.name: ParaswapAdapter
contracts.reason: DEFERRED (not infra): swap adapter reached via Bundler3 re-enter; follow-up with Bundler3.

contracts.name: ParaswapAdapter
contracts.reason: DEFERRED (not infra): Base swap adapter; follow-up with Bundler3.

contracts.name: PublicAllocator
contracts.reason: keeper/curator liquidity-reallocation across vault markets; not a wallet-owner position action

contracts.name: PublicAllocator
contracts.reason: keeper/curator reallocation

contracts.name: AdaptiveCurveIRM
contracts.reason: interest-rate model read by Morpho Blue; no direct user calls

contracts.name: AdaptiveCurveIRM
contracts.reason: interest-rate model (distinct Base address); no direct user calls

contracts.name: ChainlinkOracleV2 Factory
contracts.reason: oracle-deployment factory; infra, not user pre-sign

contracts.name: ChainlinkOracleV2 Factory
contracts.reason: oracle-deployment factory; infra

contracts.name: PreLiquidation Factory
contracts.reason: deploys pre-liquidation contracts (keeper/curator config); not a standing wallet position

contracts.reason: Morpho Vault V2 deployment factory; V2 vault instances (newer generation) are a separate user surface, deferred to a V2 follow-up

contracts.name: VaultV2 Factory
contracts.reason: Vault V2 factory (distinct Base address); V2 follow-up

contracts.name: Universal Rewards Distributor Factory
contracts.reason: DEFERRED (not infra): URD-deployment factory; the URD INSTANCES expose user claim(address,address,uint256,bytes32[]). claim maps to AirdropAction::Claim but instances are per-rewards-program (many) — deferred to a rewards-claim follow-up (enumerate instances via factory CreateUrd events / rewards API).

contracts.name: MORPHO token (MorphoTokenEthereum, transferable wrapper, ERC1967Proxy)
contracts.reason: standard ERC-20 governance token (approve/transfer/permit/delegate) — analyzed by the tokens:erc20 standard adapter; registered in token-surface as token_kind=governance. Not a Morpho-specific pre-sign manifest. Verified ContractName=ERC1967Proxy (Etherscan).

contracts.name: MORPHO token (MorphoToken, original/legacy)
contracts.reason: legacy/original MORPHO (blue-sdk morphoToken key); standard ERC-20 — tokens:erc20 adapter. Verified ContractName=MorphoToken (Etherscan). The app-canonical transferable token is 0x58d97b..; both tracked.

contracts.name: MORPHO token (Base)
contracts.reason: MORPHO on Base (docs.morpho.org/addresses); standard ERC-20 governance — tokens:erc20 adapter; token-surface registered.
